title: Fry Irish Basmati Rice
description: A fresh and crisp post-workout dish featuring basmati rice that's been lightly fried to enhance its texture and flavor, suitable for those following a fodmap-friendly diet.
instructions: Rinse the basmati rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the rinsed basmati rice and cook, stirring frequently, for about 3 minutes or until lightly golden brown on all sides.
Transfer to a serving dish and serve immediately.
